allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "python -c \\"import inspect, numpy as np; from faster_whisper import vad; print\('funcs:', [n for n in dir\(vad\) if not n.startswith\('_'\)]\); print\('sig:', inspect.signature\(vad.get_speech_timestamps\)\); import dataclasses; print\('VadOptions:', [f.name for f in dataclasses.fields\(vad.VadOptions\)]\); a=\(0.01*np.random.randn\(16000*2\)\).astype\('float32'\); a[8000:12000]=0.0; r=vad.get_speech_timestamps\(a, vad.VadOptions\(\)\); print\('ret type', type\(r\)\); print\('sample', r[:2]\)\\"")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'python -c "import wave,numpy as np; w=wave.open\(r'\\''__TRACKED_VAR__\\logs\\board_audio.wav'\\'','\\''rb'\\''\); a=np.frombuffer\(w.readframes\(w.getnframes\(\)\),dtype='\\''<i2'\\''\).astype\(np.float32\)/32768.0; import numpy as np; peak=float\(np.max\(np.abs\(a\)\)\); rms=float\(np.sqrt\(np.mean\(a**2\)\)\); clip=float\(np.mean\(np.abs\(a\)>0.98\)*100\); sil=float\(np.mean\(np.abs\(a\)<0.01\)*100\); print\(f'\\''peak={peak:.3f} rms={rms:.4f} rms_dBFS={20*np.log10\(rms+1e-9\):.1f}dB clip%={clip:.3f} near_silence%={sil:.1f}'\\''\)"')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'python -c "import wave,numpy as np; w=wave.open\(r'\\''__TRACKED_VAR__\\logs\\board_audio.wav'\\'','\\''rb'\\''\); rate=w.getframerate\(\); a=np.frombuffer\(w.readframes\(w.getnframes\(\)\),dtype='\\''<i2'\\''\).astype\(np.float32\); g=0.45/ \(np.max\(np.abs\(a\)\)/32768.0\); a=np.clip\(a*g,-32768,32767\).astype\('\\''<i2'\\''\); o=wave.open\(r'\\''__TRACKED_VAR__\\logs\\board_audio_gain.wav'\\'','\\''wb'\\''\); o.setnchannels\(1\); o.setsampwidth\(2\); o.setframerate\(rate\); o.writeframes\(a.tobytes\(\)\); o.close\(\); print\('\\''gain x%.1f -> peak 0.45'\\''%g\)"')
Bash(timeout 25 ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa hdmi-overlay ' *)
